Title: COMMENT ON COLUMN
Description: Add or update or remove a comment for a column of a table or view

Note : By specifying IS NULL or IS '' you remove the comment for the column.
If the column (or table or view) is dropped, the associated comment is also removed. Note : it is not allowed or possible to add comments for columns of temporary tables in schema "tmp".
See also: ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN , ALTER TABLE DROP COLUMN .
Examples:
COMMENT ON COLUMN [
schema_name
'.' ]
table_or_view_name
'.'
column_name
IS  { 'comment text' | NULL | '' }
COMMENT ON COLUMN sys.comments.remark IS 'contains description text'
